mnemonics.title: Board Components
mnemonics.content: PIN A Thing - Power (supply pins), Input/Output (GPIO pins), Networking (WiFi/Ethernet) - key board sections

mnemonics.title: MCU vs MPU
mnemonics.content: MCU = Complete & Compact (integrated), MPU = Powerful but needs Peripherals (external chips needed)

mnemonics.title: Popular IoT Boards
mnemonics.content: ARE - Arduino (simple MCU tasks), Raspberry Pi (full Linux gateway), ESP32 (wireless IoT, WiFi+BT built-in)

mnemonics.title: Board Selection Criteria
mnemonics.content: PPCC - Processing power needed, Power budget available, Connectivity required, Cost constraints
